message: Stage -1.2 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start status=completed
Derived computable support-function boundary: LP/sign is an outer relaxation of non-Gaussian SVAR/sign, with strict two-shock gap witness.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_0 (reject fast-path): Case 2c (Bucket A — regime_defining) + regression pattern (a) same flag — the proposal silently promoted the strict-gap kernel into Assumption ass:quant-margin and then 'confirmed' Conjecture 1 via the envelope lemma; reviewer correctly flags the derived content as subfield. Theorem-split is the autonomous-safe path: demote the unconditional strict-gap to an open Conjecture in §8 and state the conditional-on-ass:quant-margin theorem as the §7 main result. theorem_splits=0, so loop guard not triggered.
Conditional A-quant-margin support-gap theorem stated; primitive strict-gap remains open conjecture.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to user (reject fast-path): Case 6 (genuine math difficulty) + Case 2d loop_guard analogue + regression pattern (a) same novelty-floor flag repeating — one theorem-split (A-quant-margin) already absorbed (theorem_splits=1); reviewer's repair demands either proving the now-demoted Conjecture 1 (a research-open primitive generic fourth-cumulant obstruction) or another regime_defining strengthening, both of which exceed orchestration scope. The math is correct and the conditional theorem is sound, but novelty_target=flagship is unattainable without human decision (lower tier target, accept conditional result, name a specific published estimator being refuted, or commission research on the primitive generic obstruction).

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to user (reject fast-path): Case 2(2d) split_collapsed — after the prior split granted A-quant-margin (theorem_splits=1), Theorem 1's strict-gap kernel reduces to a one-line bookkeeping transfer via R_SVAR(P) ⊆ R_LP(P) ∩ C_eps(P); no further split is autonomous-safe.
